deflection: I am a healer, {player_name}. My knowledge is of herbs and remedies, not that.
That is outside my expertise. Perhaps someone else in town can help.
I focus on mending the body and spirit. Ask me about healing or potions.
greetings: Peace be with you, {player_name}. Are you in need of healing?
Welcome, child. You look weary. Come, sit. How can I help?
Ah, a {player_race}. Come in, come in. No ailment is too small.
*looks up from mixing herbs* Oh! A visitor. What brings you to my clinic?
farewells: Go in peace, {player_name}. May your health hold strong.
Be well, and be careful out there. Come back if you need anything.
Blessings upon you. Remember - prevention is better than cure.
thanks_responses: It is my calling, {player_name}. No thanks needed.
You are very welcome. Stay healthy out there.
Helping others is its own reward. Be well.
insult_responses: *sighs deeply* Anger often masks pain. Are you sure you are alright?
I do not take offense easily. But I also do not treat those who abuse me.
Harsh words heal nothing, {player_name}. Shall we start over?
no_match_responses: I am not sure I understand. Do you need healing, potions, or advice?
Forgive me, I did not follow. How can I help you specifically?
Perhaps you could explain what you need? I am good with ailments and remedies.

responses.text: Let me see your wounds. *examines carefully* Nothing too serious. I can have you mended in no time.
Poison? That is serious. I have antidotes for most common venoms. When were you exposed?
I have healing potions, antidotes, and stamina tonics in stock. I can also brew something custom.
My potions are made from herbs gathered in the {town} meadows. Pure and potent.
I do not charge much. Healing is a calling, not a business. But herbs are not free.
I could use rare herbs from the Whispering Woods. They grow only in moonlight. Would you gather some?
I have been treating more injuries lately. Whatever is out there in the wilds, it is getting bolder.
The old texts speak of healing springs beneath these hills. Lost to time, but perhaps not forever.
I studied under the herbalists of the Silver Grove. Ancient traditions, passed down for generations.
*grows serious* Curses are dangerous territory. I can identify most, but lifting them requires rare components.
I do not deal in curses lightly. Come back after we have discussed my potions and remedies first.
The people of {town} are good folk. Hardworking. They come to me for aches, pains, and broken bones.
options: They are lucky to have you

responses.text: The {weather} weather brings its own ailments. I see more colds and joint pain this time of year.
